observations.value:
GET /search?q= always returns HTTP 200 with title 'Results' but body contains only '

No results found.

' — no product results are ever returned regardless of the query string (tested with: 'test', 'a', 'widget', 'phone', 'acme', 'laptop', 'product', 'shirt', '*', both with and without a valid session cookie). A working search feature should return matching items for at least some queries.

judge_verdict.label: match
judge_verdict.reason: The observation reports that the search results list is empty (no items rendered) for any query, matching the manifest entry's expected observation of an empty search results list.
